caption: The video captures a panel discussion on a stage with three individuals seated in wooden chairs, each equipped with microphones. The setting is illuminated by vibrant purple stage lights and features a large screen in the background displaying the word "SLASH." The panel consists of two men and one woman, all dressed in semi-formal attire. The man on the left, wearing a white shirt, appears to be speaking animatedly, using hand gestures to emphasize his points. The woman in the center, dressed in black, listens attentively, occasionally nodding her head. The man on the right, in a gray suit, leans forward slightly, showing interest in the conversation. The atmosphere suggests an engaging and dynamic discussion, possibly related to technology or innovation, given the presence of what looks like a computer motherboard on a table in front of them.
